title: tournesol tinctoria
intro: Tournesol tinctoria, also known as weld, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing skin irritations and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tournesol tinctoria can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or salve, and is also used as a dye in natural fabric production.
